title: ADR-005 handoff mis-sequenced — Code Reviewer received scoping doc, not an implemented changeset
description: ADR-005 (token credit() non-negative floor) was routed to Code Reviewer via team_handoff, but Dev Clone never implemented it: no Math.max(0,...) clamp in pglite-store.ts:196 or firestore-store.ts:127, and tests/store-credit.test.ts is absent. There is no diff to review. Same pattern as ADR-001 (bill-diff). Decision needed: should architecture.analysis.completed route to Dev Clone to implement first, then re-trigger code review on implementation.completed?

title: NEW HIGH: PHI sent to Langfuse Cloud (unredacted prompts) — HIPAA decision needed
description: A re-scan found a new High-severity PHI egress: commit a1bb49e added a Langfuse tracing wrapper that sends the full unredacted LLM prompt (patient name, account, provider, charges = PHI) to Langfuse Cloud on every call (index.ts:41/44/55/58, observability.ts:66). Keys are configured so it is live. This stacks on the existing unfixed LightTrack egress (gemini.ts:40, claude-cli.ts:88). No redaction or BAA/consent gate on either. Decide remediation before this ships further.

title: Docs Sync — approve README + CHANGELOG edits (2026-06-01)
description: Two documentation edits were made to match committed code: (1) CHANGELOG [Unreleased]→Fixed entry for the dcdff6d token-refund credit-floor fix; (2) README Testing section corrected from 'No automated test suite is wired' to the real Vitest suite (npm test). No code touched. The uncommitted Supabase→Firestore migration was deliberately left undocumented until it merges.
